# WillowSoft

WillowSoft is an industrial technology company building embedded hardware, firmware, LoRaWAN connectivity, backend APIs, PostgreSQL data architecture, web/admin platforms, mobile apps, VR/simulation and telemetry systems.

## Important URLs
- Full AI-readable site summary: https://willowsoft.co/llms-full.txt
- Sitemap: https://willowsoft.co/sitemap.xml
- Products: https://willowsoft.co/en/products
- Services: https://willowsoft.co/en/services
- News: https://willowsoft.co/en/news
- Contact: https://willowsoft.co/en/contact

## Supported Locales
English, Turkish, German, French, Spanish, Italian, Arabic and Japanese.
